rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 11, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT CHARLES EASLEY, CHARLEEN GOODRICH, JACK BASS DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OFF CALENDAR in part. Demurrer is OFF CALENDAR as to Charles Easley. Based on the Notice of Death filed on March 9, 2020 Defendant Easley died in 2018. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that deceased parties may bring motions. Demurrer by other moving defendants is sustained without leave to amend on res judicata grounds. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To C.C.P. 583.310, 583.410 And 583.420
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 24, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANTs DON FELTON, CULLIGAN WATER SYSTEMS COMPANY SACRAMENTO's Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To C.C.P. 583.310, 583.410 And 583.420 Hearing Required. Moving party to provide a copy of death certificate for Mr. Felton by 8:30 a.m. on August 11, 2020. Hard copy to be delivered to Department 501 after filing. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Defendant Gary Holbrook
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 11, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANTs CHARLES EASLEY, CHARLEEN GOODRICH, and JACK BASS's Motion To Dismiss Defendant Gary Holbrook OFF CALENDAR. Defendant's default was entered on June 12, 2020. Defaulted Defendant cannot seek any relief in the action before the default is vacated. This motion was filed on June 17, 2020. Notice of this motion to dismiss does not indicate that this is also a motion to vacate default. The relief that may be afforded on the motion is limited to the notice of motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hrg 7/20/20 Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Defendants Charles L. Easley, Charleen Goodrich, Jack Bass, George Trefcer, Andrew Paulson, Pensco Trust Company, Pensco, Inc. Chris Radich, Cynthia Weaver, Kelly Rodriques, Tom Anderson, Homepointe Property Management, Robert Machado, Ann Ford (Erroneously Sued As Ann Fisher) And Eileen Stearman
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 11, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANTs CHARLES EASLEY, ANDREW PAULSON, PENSCO TRUST COMPANY, KELLY RODRIQUES, CHRIS RADICH, CYNTHIA WEAVER, TOM ANDERSON, PENSCO, INC., GEORGE TREFCER, HOMEPOINTE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, ROBERT MACHADO, EILLEEN STEARMAN, CHARLEEN GOODRICH, JACK BASS, and ANN FORD's Motion To Dismiss Defendants Charles L. Easley, Charleen Goodrich, Jack Bass, George Trefcer, Andrew Paulson, Pensco Trust Company, Pensco, Inc. Chris Radich, Cynthia Weaver, Kelly Rodriques, Tom Anderson, Homepointe Property Management, Robert Machado, Ann Ford (Erroneously Sued As Ann Fisher) And Eileen Stearman OFF CALENDAR. Based on the Notice of Death filed on March 9, 2020 Defendant Easley died in 2018. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that deceased parties may bring motions. Furthermore, as to all other moving defendants, this motion is premature. Plaintiff had 30 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Moving parties cite no authority for the proposition that the time to amend runs from the ruling date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 11, 2020 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs OLIVER PAINE, DENNIS PETROU, and BRIAN UTTER's Motion For Attorneys Fees continued to September 11, 2020. On July 29, 2020 the Court requested that courtesy copies of the papers in support of and in opposition to the motion be provided. The Court did not receive Courtesy copies. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of all filings in support of and in opposition to this motion by no later than August 31, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 11, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM's Motion To Strike Tax Costs GRANTED. Memo of Costs is not timely filed. The Court notes that while the moving party provided courtesy copes as requested on July 29, 2020, the copies have not been stapled or bound. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS DURKIN VS. FRANCIS RYAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 11, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANTs FRANCIS RYAN and CHRISTINE RYAN's Motion To Dismiss Complaint DENIED. To the extent Defendants intended to file a motion for judgment on the pleadings under CCP 438, the motion is denied as it raises issues of fact that cannot be determined at this stage of the litigation. To the extent the motion is based on CCP 581, the motion is DENIED as the moving party fails to provide any support for dismissal under CCP 581 in the points and authorities. To the extent Defendant is moving under CCP 425.16, the motion is OFF CALENDAR as this relief is not listed as grounds for the motion in the Notice of Motion. = (501/CFH)
